commercial.name: AI-Powered Mobile Application Services
commercial.description: Designed and deployed backend infrastructure and an AI ML-powered Chatbot. Leveraged RAG, advanced LLMs, and MCP for intelligent conversational flows. Architected the backend using robust asynchronous patterns with caching and background messaging. Fully containerized and deployed on Digital Ocean utilizing complete CI/CD automation.

commercial.name: Club Management Web Application
commercial.description: Developed highly scalable backend microservices for a dynamic club management platform. Focused on rigorous database schema modeling, rapid API responses, and strong typed data validation structures ensuring enterprise-level reliability and data integrity.

commercial.name: Health Monitoring System
commercial.description: Architected enhancements for a SAP HANA health monitoring system. Implemented robust data collection with FastAPI, comprehensive metrics via Prometheus, and visualization with Grafana. Integrated Alert Manager alongside advanced AI/ML algorithms to proactively detect and notify on anomalies in mission-critical SAP environments.

commercial.name: License Manager Service
commercial.description: Engineered a scalable License Manager platform designed for tracking commercial product lifecycles. Features include automated license generation, secure distribution architectures, and granular tracking to enforce compliance and streamline commercial sales operations.

personal.name: OrbitFlow
personal.description: A distributed workflow orchestration engine built from scratch

personal.name: SecureVault
personal.description: Secure file storage system using FastAPI with encryption, blockchain integrity, and multi-interface access support

personal.name: DevBrain
personal.description: An AI-powered observability and debugging platform for distributed systems with real-time log ingestion, anomaly detection, and deep learning-based root cause analysis.

personal.name: PulseIQ
personal.description: A real-time decision intelligence engine that ingests and analyzes live data streams. Computes rolling metrics and detects anomalies instantly without heavy cloud dependencies.

personal.name: AthenaCore
personal.description: A real-time cyber threat intelligence and response system that ingests live network logs, runs ML-based anomaly detection and threat classification, and delivers instant AI-powered attack analysis via a live WebSocket dashboard.
